info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' meGaSabde ' iti kavikalpadrume  ' garjed gfYjed gajed gaYjecCabdane gAjayeRRici ' (Slo.59) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: milakara cillAnA jora se Sabda karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'niraBrameva cAkASaM prajagarja mahAsvanam' (BA॰Adi॰30.36) stanituM (stanayitum) pracakrame praSabda AdikarmaRi drazwavyaH
'SArdUlAviva cAnyonyamAmizArTe'ByagarjatAm' (BA0 droRa0 13330) aByagarjatAm AhvayetAm AhUtipUrvamavASyetAm udanardatAm

'kfzwAseH pratibimbaM svaM hitvA nAnyo'sya saMmuKaH nAparaH pratiSabdAcca garjataH pratigarjati' (rAja0 81563).. pratigarjati pratidvandvitayA garjati aho ayonijopamA kaveH fzIRAM kadanaM kftvA garjati mAmapi pratigarjati siMho DanaDvaniM pratigarjati ukto'rTaH
